description_long: This object is a modern athletic shoe featuring a streamlined silhouette and a low-cut design. The upper is composed of two main shades of blue, with a darker blue dominating the toe, lace area, and heel, while a lighter blue covers the midfoot and sole. The shoe has three visible lace eyelets with matching blue laces, and the midsole displays a subtle hexagonal texture, suggesting cushioning and grip. The heel is rounded and reinforced, while the toe box is smooth and slightly upturned for ergonomic comfort. The overall construction appears lightweight and flexible, suitable for urban walking or running.
description: A modern, low-cut athletic shoe in two shades of blue with a textured sole and blue laces, designed for comfort and urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe box, three blue lace eyelets, and the smooth, streamlined upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-tone blue color scheme, hexagonal midsole texture, and the full lace area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded, reinforced heel and the continuous sole wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the laces and the textured midsole.
